title: Anim´s Resolution
description: A Texture Pack that adds PVP Essentials, QoL Add-Ons and strong FPS-Boosts
body:
<details>
- <summary>Early Access 🔒</summary>

### Early Access available on Discord ↓

[![Alt Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2334cf3eb4b13ee2695bae533f8044f6237efd83.png)](https://discord.gg/hjVXth7Cyy)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Introducing 📖</summary>

- FPS Boosting Pack
- Whole Armors (and Models) retextured
- clean Pixels
- no Graphical Bugs etc.
- Whole GUI Bar retextured
- New clean font
- Low fire
- Low shield
- Outlined Wool
- Outlined CobWebs
- Some QoL Tweaks
- Eating Animation

</details>

<details>
<summary>Features ➕</summary>

- Cleaner Tool Textures
- 3D Mace (Inventory & Hand)
- All Armors retextured
- Bow & crosbow Detector
- Low Fire
- Low Shield
- Web Outlines
- Custom Font
- New Armor Models
- Animated Totem
- Powder Snow Texture
- Suspicious Outlines
- Eating Animation
- 3D Hearts as the Health Bar
- Full set of heart states (normal, hardcore, poison, wither, absorption, freeze)
- Golden XP Bar in Enchantment Style
- Clean pixels & no blur
- transparent backgrounds
- Clean HotBar Selector
- Clean HotBar
- Cleaner Spears
- Battery Destroying Animation
- No Pumpkin Blur

</details>

<details>
<summary>Compatibility 💻</summary>

- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x
- Also works as a pure resource pack that means no mods required


</details>

<details>
<summary>How to Install? 🧭</summary>

1. Put the zip into resourcepacks.
2. Move it to the top of the list.
3. Enjoy the Pack :>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Permissions 🔑</summary>
  
- No reuploads/reposts of the pack files.
- Only private Edits; ask for permission to redistribute.

</details>
<details>
<summary>Credits 💞</summary>
- Web Outlines by MC7DZ
- Outlined Ores by MKD
- XP Bar inspired by Sharpness 500K

</details>
  
<details>
<summary>Future Updates</summary>
The Pack will be updated every Update but it also depends on the feedback I get on discord
  
</details>
